Answer choice: \boxed{}
Based on the provided evidence, there is no direct information regarding the reproducibility of ISAC 112 testing for specific IgE, nor any studies validating consistency or precision of results over time or between labs. While ISAC offers broad allergen profiling, the absence of reported data on technical repeatability or analytical performance undermines claims of reproducibility.
